title: Roundtable judge verdict
description: One judge's ruling on each still-open disagreement point, after seeing every seat's final position. Judges are read-only and rule on the merits.

verdicts.description: One ruling per open disagreement point.

ruling.description: The judge's decision on this point — which position is correct, or a better synthesis.

confidence.description: The judge's confidence (0-100) in this ruling.
